case_title: THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO VS SLAP, STAN D.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,252.52 FILED BY THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT SLAP, STAN D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
